# Support toolkits.gg

Thank you for considering supporting toolkits.gg! Your support helps us continue to create and maintain valuable tools for the community. Here are some ways you can help:

---

## Financial Support

### Patreon

Become a patron and gain access to exclusive perks and updates.

[Visit our Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/JoshPayette)

### Ko-Fi

Buy us a coffee to show your appreciation!

[Visit our Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/remnant2toolkit)

## Other Ways to Help

### Share and Promote

Spread the word! Share our site and tools with your friends, colleagues, and on social media. Every share helps us grow and reach more users.

### Join the Community

Join our Discord to interact with the community, get help, or just hang out.

[Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/VQF23tPKyK)

### Contribute Code

Check out the [Contributing Guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md) to learn how you can contribute to the project.

---

Thank you for your support! If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to us at **yo@toolkits.gg** or in the Discord.
